title: Mantra of Misfortune
relevance_summary: Insider trading and liquidity drain leading to sudden token price collapse

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends tokens to an exchange within a short timeframe after large token transfers between insiders.

red_flags: Large token transfers to exchanges by insiders shortly before price collapse
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends tokens to an exchange within a short timeframe after large token transfers between insiders.
summary: Insiders moved large amounts of OM tokens to exchanges just before the token price collapsed by 91%. A guard could have detected and blocked these transfers to prevent funds loss.
